title: pimelea prostrata var. alpina
intro: Pimelea prostrata var. alpina, also known as Alpine Rice Flower, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Pimelea prostrata var. alpina include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical cream, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and other health problems.
